'''nozajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberaltarian|liberaltarian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberaltarian|liberaltarian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nozajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozajithi|nozajithi]] || [[word:nozajiji|nozajiji]] || [[word:nozajishi|nozajishi]] || [[word:nozajiki|nozajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozajuthuthu|nozajuthuthu]] || [[word:nozajujuju|nozajujuju]] || [[word:nozajushushu|nozajushushu]] || [[word:nozajukuku|nozajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozajuthu|nozajuthu]] || [[word:nozajuju|nozajuju]] || [[word:nozajushu|nozajushu]] || [[word:nozajuku|nozajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozajufthuf|nozajufthuf]] || [[word:nozajufjuf|nozajufjuf]] || [[word:nozajufshuf|nozajufshuf]] || [[word:nozajufkuf|nozajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozajethe|nozajethe]] || [[word:nozajeje|nozajeje]] || [[word:nozajeshe|nozajeshe]] || [[word:nozajeke|nozajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozajothotho|nozajothotho]] || [[word:nozajojojo|nozajojojo]] || [[word:nozajoshosho|nozajoshosho]] || [[word:nozajokoko|nozajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozajotho|nozajotho]] || [[word:nozajojo|nozajojo]] || [[word:nozajosho|nozajosho]] || [[word:nozajoko|nozajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozajofthof|nozajofthof]] || [[word:nozajofjof|nozajofjof]] || [[word:nozajofshof|nozajofshof]] || [[word:nozajofkof|nozajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfthÃŸf|nozajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfjÃŸf|nozajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfshÃŸf|nozajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfkÃŸf|nozajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nozajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nozajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nozajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nozajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfthÃŸf|nozajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfjÃŸf|nozajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfshÃŸf|nozajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfkÃŸf|nozajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfthÃŸf|nozajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfjÃŸf|nozajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfshÃŸf|nozajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nozajÃŸfkÃŸf|nozajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozajÃḊthÃḊ|nozajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nozajÃḊjÃḊ|nozajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nozajÃḊshÃḊ|nozajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nozajÃḊkÃḊ|nozajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozajathatha|nozajathatha]] || [[word:nozajajaja|nozajajaja]] || [[word:nozajashasha|nozajashasha]] || [[word:nozajakaka|nozajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozajatha|nozajatha]] || [[word:nozajaja|nozajaja]] || [[word:nozajasha|nozajasha]] || [[word:nozajaka|nozajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozajafthaf|nozajafthaf]] || [[word:nozajafjaf|nozajafjaf]] || [[word:nozajafshaf|nozajafshaf]] || [[word:nozajafkaf|nozajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nozajasha|nozajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozajshÃḋasha|nozajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozajroasha|nozajroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozajmuasha|nozajmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozajyaasha|nozajyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozajnkshÃḋasha|gonozajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozajnkroasha|gonozajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozajnkmuasha|gonozajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozajnkyaasha|gonozajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nozazajasha|nozazajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozazajshÃḋasha|nozazajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozazajroasha|nozazajroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozazajmuasha|nozazajmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozazajyaasha|nozazajyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozazajnkshÃḋasha|gonozazajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozazajnkroasha|gonozazajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozazajnkmuasha|gonozazajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozazajnkyaasha|gonozazajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nezÃḊjasha|nezÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nezÃḊjshÃḋasha|nezÃḊjshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nezÃḊjroasha|nezÃḊjroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nezÃḊjmuasha|nezÃḊjmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nezÃḊjyaasha|nezÃḊjyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonezÃḊjnkshÃḋasha|gonezÃḊjnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonezÃḊjnkroasha|gonezÃḊjnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonezÃḊjnkmuasha|gonezÃḊjnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonezÃḊjnkyaasha|gonezÃḊjnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nozfajasha|nozfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozfajshÃḋasha|nozfajshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozfajroasha|nozfajroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozfajmuasha|nozfajmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozfajyaasha|nozfajyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozfajnkshÃḋasha|gonozfajnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozfajnkroasha|gonozfajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozfajnkmuasha|gonozfajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozfajnkyaasha|gonozfajnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
